name: default
description: Machine-readable sibling of the code-approaches exploration: title, context, an approaches array (name, code, pros, cons), and a recommendation. Placeholder strings keep the file parseable; the agent expands the single template element into one entry per approach.

slots.description: Prompt or problem statement that motivated the exploration.
Approach name. The approaches array (see shape) carries one example element to clone per approach.
Representative code sketch for the approach.
Which approach to take and why.

shape.approach[]: { name: string, code: string, pros: string[], cons: string[] }
